summary: Build a modern, premium, trustworthy real estate + construction company website for Dev Properties & Construction (Lucknow, India) with a blue/white theme, modern typography, key marketing sections, contact details, WhatsApp CTA, and strong lead-generation calls-to-action.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Premium real estate hero banner with modern homes/apartments and subtle construction elements, blue/white palette (hero-real-estate-construction.dim_1600x800.png)
- Minimal set of 5 monochrome line icons in a consistent style for: buy, sell, rent, property management, construction (services-icons-sprite.dim_800x200.png)
- Clean abstract city/skyline or architectural pattern background, very subtle, blue/white (section-bg-architecture.dim_1600x900.png)
- Professional testimonial section background texture/pattern, subtle, blue/white (testimonials-bg.dim_1600x600.png)

existing_features.title: Create a responsive, modern, professional marketing website for “Dev Properties & Construction” with a trustworthy, premium, simple look using a clean blue/white theme, modern typography, and real-estate/construction visuals (homes, apartments, construction).
Implement site navigation that provides access to these sections/pages: Home, About Us, Services, Properties (Buy/Sell/Rent), Construction, Why Choose Us, Testimonials, Contact Us.
Add clear, prominent CTAs throughout the site, including buttons labeled exactly: “Get Free Consultation”, “List Your Property”, and “Book Site Visit”.
Create the Home section with a hero area that introduces the company (Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India; 15 years experience; services summary) and includes at least one primary CTA.
Create the About Us section describing Dev Properties & Construction, emphasizing 15 years of experience, trust, and local expertise in Lucknow.
Create the Services section that clearly lists and describes: buying properties, selling properties, reselling properties, property management, and construction services.

Create the Properties section with distinct options for Buy, Sell, and Rent; include a clean UI to switch between these categories (tabs/segmented control) and show representative property cards/content for each category (static content is acceptable).
Create the Construction section describing construction offerings and process (e.g., planning, design, execution, quality, timelines), aligned to a premium, trustworthy tone.

Create the Why Choose Us section with clear value propositions relevant to the business (e.g., 15 years experience, local market expertise, transparent dealing, end-to-end support, quality construction).

Create the Testimonials section with a premium layout and at least 3 testimonials (English) presented as example client feedback (clearly not attributed to real individuals unless generic names are used).
Create the Contact Us section that displays the phone number, email, and physical address exactly as provided, and includes a contact form for inquiries (name, phone, email, message).
Add a floating WhatsApp button that opens a WhatsApp chat to the provided phone number, and ensure the phone number and email are clickable (tel: and mailto: links).
Add a consistent site footer containing company name, quick links to the main sections, and the provided contact details (phone/email/address).
Ensure all user-facing copy is in English and avoids placeholder text; include the company name “Dev Properties & Construction” prominently in the header/branding.
Add and render generated static visual assets (from frontend/public/assets/generated) that match the real estate + construction theme (hero/banner and a small set of section visuals/icons).

new_feature_requests.summary: Create website structure with pages/sections: Home, About Us, Services, Properties (Buy/Sell/Rent), Construction, Why Choose Us, Testimonials, Contact Us
Add lead-generation CTAs: “Get Free Consultation”, “List Your Property”, and “Book Site Visit” across relevant sections
Add contact details and quick-contact features: WhatsApp button, phone +91 85659 64384, email devproperties44@gmail.com, address (Lucknow 226029)
Apply visual design direction: clean blue/white theme, modern fonts, premium/trustworthy styling
Use real-estate/construction visuals (homes, apartments, construction) throughout the site

Backend: implement minimal persistence for contact form submissions in the single Motoko actor (store timestamped inquiries) and expose methods to create an inquiry and list inquiries (for future admin use).
